reviews.name: Brenda H.
reviews.text: Dr. Zimmerman has been my chiropractor for 8 years. He is thorough, professional, and always takes the time to explain what he's doing and why. My chronic back pain is completely manageable now.

reviews.name: Tyler K.
reviews.text: Came in with a sports injury that had been nagging me for months. Dr. Zimmerman found the problem in the first visit and had me back training within 3 weeks. Great clinic.

reviews.name: Donna F.
reviews.text: The registered massage therapy here is excellent. Combined with chiropractic adjustments, it's the best care I've ever received. I drive from Edmonton specifically to come here.

reviews.name: Ryan M.
reviews.text: Got fitted for custom orthotics after years of foot and knee pain. The difference was noticeable within the first week. Highly recommend the orthotic scanning.

reviews.name: Melissa T.
reviews.text: Very kind and professional office. I was nervous about chiropractic but Dr. Zimmerman made me feel completely at ease. My neck pain resolved after 5 visits.

reviews.name: Gary L.
reviews.text: The interferential therapy for my rotator cuff injury worked better than the physiotherapy I'd been doing for 6 months. Wish I'd come here sooner.

reviews.name: Sheryl P.
reviews.text: Best chiropractic clinic in Fort Saskatchewan. Dr. Zimmerman genuinely cares about his patients and the results speak for themselves. Five stars without question.

heroSub: Fort Saskatchewan's trusted chiropractic clinic since 2004. Dr. Robert Zimmerman offers chiropractic adjustments, orthotics, interferential therapy, and registered massage therapy to help you live pain-free.

services.title: Chiropractic Adjustment
services.desc: Precise spinal and joint corrections to relieve pain, restore mobility, and support your body's natural healing processes.

services.title: Orthotic Scanning
services.desc: Advanced digital foot scanning and custom orthotic fabrication to correct foot imbalances and improve whole-body alignment.

services.title: Interferential Therapy
services.desc: Low-frequency electrical stimulation to reduce pain, decrease inflammation, and accelerate soft tissue healing.

services.title: Registered Massage Therapy
services.desc: On-site RMT providing professional therapeutic massage to complement chiropractic care and support recovery.

comboDesc: Chiropractic, orthotics, interferential therapy, and registered massage therapy under one roof — comprehensive care for your whole body.
conditionsDesc: From workplace injuries to sports conditions and chronic pain, Dr. Zimmerman has been helping Fort Saskatchewan residents recover since 2004.
conditionsClick: ↓ Click a condition for more information
conditionsNote: Every patient receives a thorough examination before treatment. Dr. Zimmerman takes the time to understand your health history and goals to create the most effective care plan for you.
approachDesc: We don't just treat the symptom. Our comprehensive approach ensures you get better — and stay better.

phases.title: Relief Care
phases.desc: We focus on reducing your pain and discomfort as quickly as possible using the most appropriate combination of chiropractic adjustment, interferential therapy, and massage.

phases.title: Corrective Care
phases.desc: Once pain is under control, we address underlying structural issues — including foot mechanics with custom orthotics where appropriate — to prevent recurring problems.

phases.title: Wellness Care
phases.desc: Ongoing maintenance to keep your musculoskeletal system healthy, your body resilient, and your quality of life high.

phasesNote: At the end of each phase, Dr. Zimmerman will evaluate your progress and recommend the best options to continue your care and prevent relapse.
firstVisitDesc: We want your first visit to be informative and comfortable. Here's exactly what to expect at Zimmerman Chiropractic.

firstVisitSteps.title: Patient Forms
firstVisitSteps.desc: Complete health history and condition intake forms upon arrival.

firstVisitSteps.title: Consultation
firstVisitSteps.desc: Discuss your health concerns, pain history, and wellness goals with Dr. Zimmerman. He takes the time to truly understand your condition.

firstVisitSteps.title: Examination
firstVisitSteps.desc: Full chiropractic exam including reflex and flexibility testing, plus neurological, orthopedic, postural, and physical assessments. Nothing is done without your consent.

firstVisitSteps.title: X-Ray Studies
firstVisitSteps.desc: If needed based on your condition, X-rays are taken to develop the most effective treatment plan and check for serious spinal conditions.

firstVisitSteps.title: Report of Findings
firstVisitSteps.desc: Dr. Zimmerman provides a full report covering: How can he help you? How often will you need to come in? What will the cost be?

firstVisitSteps.title: Treatment
firstVisitSteps.desc: Dr. Zimmerman will explain the most effective and suitable treatment options. You may agree to proceed with treatment or not — the choice is entirely yours. Treatment may include chiropractic adjustment, interferential therapy, and massage as appropriate.

firstVisitSteps.title: Wellness Program
firstVisitSteps.desc: Dr. Zimmerman will recommend a home wellness program which may include stretching and strengthening exercises, as well as ice/heat instructions to support your recovery between visits.

pricingDesc: Clear pricing for all services. Most Alberta extended health benefit plans cover chiropractic and RMT. Call us to confirm your coverage.
pricingPackageNote: Many extended health benefit plans cover a set number of chiropractic and RMT visits per year. Call us to verify your coverage before your first appointment.
paymentNote: Payment accepted: cash, debit, and most major credit cards. We direct bill many insurance providers. Receipts provided for all services.
insuranceP1: Zimmerman Chiropractic accepts most Alberta Health Care and private insurance plans including Blue Cross, Great-West Life, Sun Life, Manulife, and Green Shield. We direct bill many providers.
insuranceP2: RMT (massage therapy) services are also covered under most extended health benefit plans. Call us to confirm your coverage.
ctaH2: Your First Step Towards Better Health
ctaP: Call our Fort Saskatchewan clinic today. Dr. Zimmerman will assess your condition and create a personalized care plan to get you feeling better.
aboutSubtitle: Doctor of Chiropractic · Fort Saskatchewan, Alberta · Since 2004
aboutP1: Dr. Robert Zimmerman has been serving the Fort Saskatchewan community since 2004, building a reputation for thorough, caring chiropractic care. His clinic offers a comprehensive range of services to address musculoskeletal conditions at their root cause.
aboutP2: Dr. Zimmerman's approach combines traditional chiropractic adjustments with advanced therapies including interferential current and custom orthotics, supported by on-site registered massage therapy. His goal is to help every patient achieve lasting relief and better overall wellness.

faqs.a: Yes, we direct bill many major insurance providers including Blue Cross, Great-West Life, and Sun Life. Please bring your insurance information to your first appointment.

Interferential therapy uses low-frequency electrical currents to penetrate deep into tissue, reducing pain, decreasing inflammation, and stimulating the natural healing process. It's particularly effective for soft tissue injuries and chronic pain conditions.
Yes. We use digital scanning technology to create custom orthotics precisely matched to your feet. Orthotics are highly effective for foot pain, knee pain, hip pain, and postural problems.
We are open Saturdays from 9:00 AM to 11:45 AM. Tuesday evenings until 7:00 PM are also available for those who need after-hours appointments.

bookingDesc: Book your chiropractic consultation in Fort Saskatchewan. Convenient hours including Saturday mornings and Tuesday evenings.

heroReviews.name: Brenda H.
heroReviews.text: My chronic back pain is completely manageable now. 8 years as a patient — he's the best in Fort Saskatchewan.

heroReviews.name: Ryan M.
heroReviews.text: Got custom orthotics fitted after years of pain. The difference was noticeable within the first week.

heroReviews.name: Gary L.
heroReviews.text: The interferential therapy worked better than 6 months of physiotherapy. Wish I'd come here sooner.
